title: AstralAzeta's Emerald Armor
description: This mod adds an emerald armor.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/512c02f9f37ea2692a143efcee9348bf884c3ac2.png) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Discord-Button-64.png)](https://discord.gg/hFS6faY9tW) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Modrinth-Button-64.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/astralazetas-emerald-armor)
Emerald armor is stronger than iron armor, but weaker than diamond. It has worse durability, but better enchantability.
Recipes ![Emerald Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d94e3e2119d384006eea01139ba225384491f0b.png) ![Emerald Chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fc94e2e4c38cb1c832dc1227df530d9c2385b3a.png) ![Emerald Leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0662e42c1cb60002b36d8fb80a64afb32b9c1a1f.png) ![Emerald Boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc9123a8cb5d641e0565d3ad3819e1c53569f0f7.png)
